common.pageRenderFailed: The page failed to render. Please retry.

dashboard.receiveDirectoryUnavailable: The receive folder is unavailable. Choose another folder or restore it.

deviceDetail.startAfterEndAdjusted: The start date cannot be later than the end date. It has been adjusted automatically.
deviceDetail.endBeforeStart: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date.

directory.receiveDirectoryUnavailable: The receive folder is unavailable. Choose another folder or restore it.
directory.sharedDirectoryUnavailable: The shared folder is unavailable. Choose another folder or restore it.
directory.transferActiveChangeRoot: Files are being received. Change the root folder after transfer finishes.
directory.transferActiveReceivePath: Files are being received. The receive folder cannot be changed right now.
directory.locationNotWritable: The selected location is not writable. Choose another folder.

settings.transferActiveCannotChangeReceivePath: Transfer is in progress. The receive path cannot be changed.
settings.noReceivePathToOpen: There is no receive path to open yet
settings.noSharedPathToOpen: There is no shared path to open yet
settings.bonjourRetrySuccess: The background service rechecked the Bonjour runtime
settings.bonjourRetryFailed: Failed to recheck the Bonjour runtime
settings.bonjourUnsupportedPlatform: Bonjour can only be installed automatically on Windows.
settings.bonjourPostInstallNotDetected: The installer completed, but Bonjour was not detected. Restart the app and try again.
settings.bonjourTooManyRedirects: The Bonjour download redirected too many times. Use Apple's official download page instead.
settings.bonjourInstallExitFailed: The Bonjour installer exited with code {{code}}.
settings.bonjourInstallFallback: Please try again later or use Apple's official download page.
settings.diagnosticsUploadFallbackExported: Network unavailable. Diagnostics were exported locally instead.
settings.diagnosticsUploadFallbackExportFailed: Network unavailable, and local diagnostics export failed.

settings.resetTransferActiveDescription: Files are being received. Reset data after transfer finishes.
settings.sidecarRetryFailed: Failed to retry background service startup
